response.justification: The candidate is an accomplished senior full-stack and web developer with 15+ years of experience, but the role requires deep specialization in SoC/IP modeling, AI accelerator performance analysis, and hardware-software co-design. His background centers on web platforms, product engineering, and application development in TypeScript/Node.js/DLang, with no evidence of hardware architecture, GPU/accelerator work, or deep-learning workload optimization. The modest systems-level exposure (low-latency DLang services, C/C++ at National Instruments) does not approach the principal-level hardware performance expertise this position demands.
strengths: 15+ years of broad software engineering experience across web, mobile, desktop, and embedded
Low-latency systems work at Dunnhumby/Sociomantic (async I/O, fibers, high-throughput microservices in DLang)
Some C/C++ systems experience (NI LabWindows/CVI components, audio DSP bachelor thesis)
concerns: No SoC or IP modeling experience, the core requirement of the role
No AI accelerator, GPU architecture, SIMD/MIMD, or deep-learning workload optimization background
Career trajectory is web/full-stack product engineering, misaligned with a principal hardware performance architect track

key_factors.factor: Absence of SoC/IP modeling and hardware architecture experience
No AI/deep-learning workload or GPU performance background
